intent_graph.goal: Deploy a new infrastructure blueprint on Render by connecting a repository and configuring deployment settings.

steps.intent: Initiate the creation of a new resource by selecting the 'New' option.
steps.verification_anchor: Presence of 'New' button on the dashboard homepage.

steps.intent: Navigate to the 'Blueprint' section to start configuring a new infrastructure blueprint.
steps.verification_anchor: Confirmation of navigation to the Blueprint selection page.

steps.intent: Prepare to input repository details by focusing on the relevant input field.
steps.verification_anchor: Focus state on the repository input field.

steps.intent: Provide the repository URL or identifier to link the blueprint to the correct source.
steps.verification_anchor: Text input appears in the repository field.

steps.intent: Confirm the repository selection by clicking the 'Connect' button.
steps.verification_anchor: Navigation to the blueprint configuration page.

steps.intent: Prepare to input blueprint configuration details by focusing on the relevant input field.
steps.verification_anchor: Focus state on the configuration input field.

steps.intent: Enter the required configuration details for the blueprint (e.g., environment variables, services).
steps.verification_anchor: Text input appears in the configuration fields.

steps.intent: Finalize and submit the blueprint configuration for deployment by clicking 'Deploy Blueprint'.
steps.verification_anchor: Confirmation of deployment initiation or navigation to deployment status page.

decision_points.description: User must select the correct type of resource (Blueprint) from available options.
User must input a valid repository URL or identifier to proceed.
User must provide valid and complete configuration details for the blueprint.

expected_end_state.description: The blueprint is successfully submitted for deployment, and the user is redirected to a status page showing the deployment progress or confirmation of the initiated deployment.
